khh vkhl hhrym 'shr bm'dr y'drvn--l' tbv' shmh yr't shmyr vshyt vhyh lmshlch shvr vlmrms shh {f}
' vy'mr yhvh 'ly qch lkh glyvn gdvl vkhtb 'lyv bchrt 'nvsh lmhr shll chsh bz
b v''ydh ly 'dym n'mnym--'t 'vryh hkhhn v't zkhryhv bn ybrkhyhv
g v'qrb 'l hnby'h vthr vtld bn {s} vy'mr yhvh 'ly qr' shmv mhr shll chsh bz
d khy btrm yd' hn'r qr' 'by v'my--ysh' 't chyl dmshq v't shll shmrvn lfny mlkh 'shvr {s}
h vysf yhvh dbr 'ly 'vd l'mr
v y'n khy m's h'm hzh 't my hshlch hhlkhym l't vmshvsh 't rtsyn vbn rmlyhv
z vlkhn hnh 'dny m'lh 'lyhm 't my hnhr h'tsvmym vhrbym--'t mlkh 'shvr v't khl khbvdv v'lh 'l khl 'fyqyv vhlkh 'l khl gdvtyv

t r'v 'mym vchtv vh'zynv khl mrchqy 'rts ht'zrv vchtv ht'zrv vchtv
y 'tsv 'tsh vtfr dbrv dbr vl' yqvm khy 'mnv 'l {s}
y' khy khh 'mr yhvh 'ly khchzqt hyd vysrny mlkht bdrkh h'm hzh l'mr

yg 't yhvh tsb'vt 'tv tqdyshv vhv' mvr'khm vhv' m'rtskhm
yd vhyh lmqdsh vl'bn ngf vltsvr mkhshvl lshny bty yshr'l lfch vlmvqsh--lyvshb yrvshlm
tv vkhshlv bm rbym vnflv vnshbrv vnvqshv vnlkhdv {f}
tz tsvr t'vdh chtvm tvrh blmdy
yz vchkhyty lyhvh hmstyr fnyv mbyt y'qb vqvyty lv
ych hnh 'nkhy vhyldym 'shr ntn ly yhvh l'tvt vlmvftym byshr'l--m'm yhvh tsb'vt hshkhn bhr tsyvn {s}

kh ltvrh vlt'vdh 'm l' y'mrv khdbr hzh 'shr 'yn lv shchr
kh' v'br bh nqshh vr'b vhyh khy yr'b vhtqtsf vqll bmlkhv vb'lhyv--vfnh lm'lh
khb v'l 'rts ybyt vhnh tsrh vchshkhh m'vf tsvqh v'flh mndch [ (Isaiah 8:23) khg khy l' mv'f l'shr mvtsq lh kh't hr'shvn hql 'rtsh zblvn v'rtsh nftly vh'chrvn hkhbyd--drkh hym 'br hyrdn glyl hgvym ]
' h'm hhlkhym bchshkh r'v 'vr gdvl yshby b'rts tslmvt 'vr ngh 'lyhm
b hrbyt hgvy l' (lv) hgdlt hshmchh shmchv lfnykh khshmcht bqtsyr kh'shr ygylv bchlqm shll
g khy 't 'l sblv v't mth shkhmv shbt hngsh bv--hchtt khyvm mdyn
d khy khl s'vn s'n br'sh vshmlh mgvllh bdmym vhyth lshrfh m'khlt 'sh
h khy yld yld lnv bn ntn lnv vthy hmshrh 'l shkhmv vyqr' shmv fl' yv'ts 'l gbvr 'by 'd shr shlvm
v lm rbh (lmrbh) hmshrh vlshlvm 'yn qts 'l khs' dvd v'l mmlkhtv lhkhyn 'th vls'dh bmshft vbtsdqh m'th v'd 'vlm qn't yhvh tsb'vt t'shh z't {f}
z dbr shlch 'dny by'qb vnfl byshr'l
ch vyd'v h'm khlv 'frym vyvshb shmrvn bg'vh vbgdl lbb l'mr
t lbnym nflv vgzyt nbnh shqmym gd'v v'rzym nchlyf
y vyshgb yhvh 't tsry rtsyn 'lyv v't 'ybyv yskhskh
y' 'rm mqdm vflshtym m'chvr vy'khlv 't yshr'l bkhl fh bkhl z't l' shb 'fv v'vd ydv ntvyh
yb vh'm l' shb 'd hmkhhv v't yhvh tsb'vt l' drshv {s}
yg vykhrt yhvh myshr'l r'sh vznb khfh v'gmvn--yvm 'chd
yd zqn vnshv' fnym hv' hr'sh vnby' mvrh shqr hv' hznb
tv vyhyv m'shry h'm hzh mt'ym vm'shryv mbl'ym
